hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects fragmented provider outputs into one compliance operating layer, helping VASPs apply consistent policies from onboarding through reporting with audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance rules become inconsistent across providers
problem_description: Disconnected compliance tools create gaps that slow onboarding and monitoring workflows. This fragmentation leads to duplicated reviews, weak audit trails and difficulties maintaining consistent policy application across teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, internal rules and case workflows into one operational layer that enforces consistent compliance policies across onboarding, monitoring and reporting for VASP operations.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to policy alignment
workflow_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider checks with internal rules to create consistent compliance policies routed through cases, decisions, evidence, and regulatory reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Structured compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into consistent workflows, decisions, cases and evidence, enabling VASPs to maintain audit-ready compliance across onboarding, monitoring and reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams by unifying provider outputs and preserving audit-ready evidence to strengthen governance and streamline bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help create consistent compliance rules
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows connect provider outputs
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports policy alignment reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY manages case workflows across providers
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected workflow that connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, and case data into consistent, auditable decisions across onboarding, monitoring and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures data from multiple providers into linked cases, decision logs, regulatory rule updates and reports, reducing manual handoffs and supporting consistent compliance policy application.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision records and supporting evidence in audit logs to support review readiness, internal decision transparency and regulatory inspection needs.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening systems into one operational layer without requiring provider replacement or workflow disruption.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but integrates their outputs to deliver structured reviews, workflows, policy enforcement and audit evidence on top of existing compliance tools.
final_title: Structure consistent compliance rules with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into connected workflows supporting audit-ready evidence and policy alignment for VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
